topics.label: IBM i Environment
topics.description: RDi or SEU editor on IBM i. RPG is the primary language for IBM midrange systems.

topics.label: Free-Format RPG
topics.description: Modern free-format (**FREE) replaces fixed-format columns. dcl-s, dcl-ds, dcl-proc.

topics.label: Data Types
topics.description: Packed, zoned, character, varchar, date, time, timestamp, indicator.

topics.label: File I/O
topics.description: dcl-f for file declarations. READ, WRITE, UPDATE, DELETE, CHAIN, SETLL.

topics.label: Embedded SQL
topics.description: exec sql for SQL within RPG. The modern way to access DB2 data.

topics.label: Procedures & Modules
topics.description: dcl-proc for procedures, NOMAIN modules, service programs.

topics.label: Data Structures
topics.description: dcl-ds for data structures, qualified, dim for arrays.
